message:
feat: add elevenlabs, tlon, zalo, zalouser connector scaffolds

Add FCP2 first-slice scaffolding for four new connectors:
- elevenlabs: text-to-speech generation and voice discovery
- tlon: Urbit/Tlon DM and channel send with SSRF-safe validation
- zalo: Zalo Bot API for sends, polling, and webhook management
- zalouser: guarded CLI-process connector for personal Zalo automation

Each includes manifest.toml, Cargo.toml, and implementation stubs with
sandbox profiles, zone models, and capability declarations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-elevenlabs"
+description = "ElevenLabs speech synthesis connector for the Flywheel Connector Protocol"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+
+[lib]
+name = "fcp_elevenlabs"
+path = "src/lib.rs"
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fcp-elevenlabs"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-async-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-async-core" }
+fcp-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-core" }
+
+anyhow.workspace = true
+serde.workspace = true
+serde_json.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
+tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
+

@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:elevenlabs-first-slice"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.elevenlabs"
+name = "ElevenLabs"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "ElevenLabs text-to-speech and voice discovery connector"
+archetypes = ["request-response"]
+format = "native"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "stateless"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "First slice: text-to-speech generation and voice discovery."
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = ["z:owner", "z:private", "z:work"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.egress", "network.tls.sni"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["network.listen", "system.exec"]
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 96
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 60000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true
+

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+#![forbid(unsafe_code)]
+
+pub mod connector;
+
+pub use connector::ElevenlabsConnector;
+

+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:zalo-first-slice"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.zalo"
+name = "Zalo"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Zalo Bot API connector for bot identity, outbound send, long polling, and webhook management"
+archetypes = ["bidirectional", "polling", "webhook"]
+format = "native"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "stateless"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "First slice: bot identity, message send, photo send, long-poll updates, webhook setup, and webhook token verification."
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:community"
+allowed_sources = ["z:owner", "z:work", "z:community"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:community"]
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.egress", "network.tls.sni"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.exec"]
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 96
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 60000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true
+

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@

+

+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:zalouser-first-slice"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.zalouser"
+name = "Zalo User"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Guarded helper-process connector for Zalo personal account automation"
+archetypes = ["cli-process"]
+format = "native"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "local-cache"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "First slice: explicit helper-process contract only. No bundled personal-account runtime is shipped in this crate."
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:owner"
+allowed_sources = ["z:owner"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:owner"]
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["system.exec"]
+optional = ["network.egress", "network.dns", "network.tls.sni"]
+forbidden = ["network.listen"]
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "medium"
+memory_mb = 96
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 60000
+deny_exec = false
+deny_ptrace = true
+

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+#![forbid(unsafe_code)]
+
+pub mod connector;
+
+pub use connector::ZalouserConnector;
+
